[2026.04.21-15.50.03:723][813]LogTemp: Display: MCPServerRunnable: Received: {"type":"execute_python_script","params":{"script":"\nimport unreal\nimport random\nrandom.seed(77)\n\nworld = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.UnrealEditorSubsystem).get_editor_world()\neas = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)\n\nps_actors = unreal.GameplayStatics.get_all_actors_of_class(world, unreal.PlayerStart)\nps_z = ps_actors[0].get_actor_location().z if ps_actors else 0\n\n# Cache positions\noccupied = []\nfor a in eas.get_all_level_actors():\n    try:\n        l = a.get_actor_location()\n        if abs(l.x) < 1e7:\n            occupied.append((l.x, l.y))\n    except: pass\n\ndef is_clear(x, y, min_dist=250):\n    for ox, oy in occupied:\n        dx, dy = ox - x, oy - y\n        if dx*dx + dy*dy < min_dist*min_dist:\n            return False\n    return True\n\ndef ground_z(x, y, default_z):\n    try:\n        pt = unreal.NavigationSystemV1.project_point_to_navigation(world, unreal.Vector(x, y, default_z))\n        if pt and hasattr(pt,'x') and (pt.x or pt.y or pt.z):\n            return pt.z\n    except: pass\n    return default_z\n\nspawned = 0\n\n# More diverse props: benches, fences, extra trees, trash, fire hydrants\nprops = [\n    (\"BP_Bench1\", 6, 250),\n    (\"BP_Tree3\", 4, 400),\n    (\"BP_Trash_can\", 3, 200),\n    (\"BP_Fire_hydrant\", 2, 200),\n]\n\nfor bp_name, count, min_d in props:\n    placed = 0\n    for _ in range(60):\n        if placed >= count: break\n        px = random.uniform(-2800, 2800)\n        py = random.uniform(-2800, 2800)\n        if not is_clear(px, py, min_d): continue\n        z = ground_z(px, py, ps_z)\n        bp = unreal.load_object(None, f\"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/{bp_name}.{bp_name}_C\")\n        if bp:\n            a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(bp, unreal.Vector(px, py, z))\n            if a:\n                a.set_actor_label(f\"Prop_{bp_name}_{placed}\")\n                occupied.append((px, py))\n                placed += 1; spawned += 1\n\n# Additional building for density: BP_Building_44 (small shack-like)\nfor bx, by in [(1000, -1000), (-1200, -800)]:\n    if is_clear(bx, by, 800):\n        z = ground_z(bx, by, ps_z)\n        bp = unreal.load_object(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Building_44.BP_Building_44_C\")\n        if bp:\n            a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(bp, unreal.Vector(bx, by, z))\n            if a:\n                a.set_actor_label(f\"Shack_44_{spawned}\")\n                occupied.append((bx, by))\n                spawned += 1\n\nprint(f\"ROUND3_SPAWNED={spawned}\")\n"}}
